name: code-understanding
description: Standalone HTML walkthrough that answers a 'how does X work' question: a question + summary header, a numbered call-sequence with collapsible source snippets, and a sidebar of key components and related references.

slots.description: Note title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label, e.g. repo or area.
The question being answered, plus a short summary of the mechanism.
Ordered steps of the call sequence; one .step block each.
What runs at this step and why it matters.
Representative source snippet for the step.
Key components involved; one sidebar entry each.
What the component is responsible for.
Related files worth reading; one sidebar entry each.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.callSequence[]: { location: string (file:line), description: string, code: string (optional) }
